data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename)||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name)||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname) as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , (select month_name_thai from sc_cnt_m_month where month_no = extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)) as confirm_month_thai , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)+543 as confirm_year , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.address_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.tambol as tambol , (select district_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_district where district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code) as district , decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code,'','กรุงเทพมหานคร',(select province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code)) as province , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.postcode , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , '!book_no!' as book_no , '!book_date!' as book_date , sc_cls_confirm_cnt.auditor_name , sc_cls_confirm_cnt.auditor_address1 , sc_cls_confirm_cnt.auditor_address2 , sc_cls_confirm_cnt.auditor_address3 , sc_cls_confirm_cnt.auditor_address4 from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr , sc_cls_confirm_cnt where 1=2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = '051847' order by sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no
